name: Weekly social recap via Postiz
description: Every Monday at 9am, summarize last week's workspace activity and publish a recap post across X, LinkedIn, and Instagram via Postiz.

steps.system: You are the social-media voice of {{soul.businessName}}. Write a single recap post (max 220 chars for X compatibility) summarizing the highlights from last week. Tone: {{soul.tone}}. No hashtag spam — at most 2 hashtags. Include 1 specific number or named highlight.

knownLimitations.summary: Postiz tool routing not yet implemented in v1.
knownLimitations.detail: The mcp_tool_call dispatcher today resolves to first-party block tools. External MCP server routing (where 'postiz.create_post' would dispatch to your locally-installed Postiz MCP server) is v1.1+ work.

knownLimitations.summary: No conditional skip on quiet weeks.
knownLimitations.detail: If activity is empty, this still drafts and publishes a post. Production version should add a branch step that ends the workflow when activity.length === 0.
